Put this card on this vampire. This vampire is considered Anarch. Burn this card if this vampire changes sect.

rulings.text: Is a change of the actual sect. A temporary effect overriding the sect has precedence and if it does, this card burns (eg. {Writ of Acceptance}). [LSJ 20100811]
Does not make the action an action that "makes this vampire anarch" (eg. {CrimethInc.} cannot be played). [ANK 20180125]
The burn option cannot be used if you have a non-titled, non-Anarch vampire in torpor. [LSJ 20091204]
If the action required another (non-Anarch) sect and is not blocked, the action fizzles (is successful but has no effect). [ANK 20210124]

name: The Red Question

card_text:
Only usable as the action is announced.
[dom] Choose a locked vampire. The chosen vampire cannot block this action.
[DOM] During this action, minions cannot unlock.

rulings.text: [DOM] Does not prevent wake effects to be played (eg. {Wake with Evening's Freshness}), but does prevent unlock after action resolution (eg. {Freak Drive} or [ani] {Cats' Guidance}). [PIB 20150703]

Must be played (as well as other "as the action is announced" action modifiers) before action modifiers that are not explicitly played "as the action is announced" (e.g., {Conditioning}). [ANK 20190425]
Replace the action card (if any) before playing it. [ANK 20181208]

name: The Sleeping Mind

card_text:
Requires a Laibon with capacity above 4. Only usable when the action is announced.
The acting vampire gets two additional votes in any referendums conducted during this action (even blood hunt referendums). Any younger vampire successfully blocking this action burns 1 blood (before combat, if any). If he or she cannot, the block fails and the action continues as if unblocked.

rulings.text: Must be played (as well as other "as the action is announced" action modifiers) before action modifiers that are not explicitly played "as the action is announced" (e.g., {Conditioning}). [ANK 20190425]
Replace the action card (if any) before playing it. [ANK 20181208]
If the action continues "as if unblocked", all action modifiers and reaction cards are still in effect, even those pertaining to a successful block. [RTR 19941109] [ANK 20190116]
If the action continues "as if unblocked", any Methuselahs that have declined to block before do not get another opportunity to block. [ANK 20190116]

For actions resulting from an action card, "continue as if unblocked" moves the action card from the ash heap (where it went when the action was blocked) to limbo (where it should be if the action is not blocked). If the action card is not in the ash heap, then the action cannot be continued. [LSJ 20070808-1]

card_text:
Usable by a ready unlocked vampire other than the acting minion.
[dem] Cancel a non-combat card requiring Dementation [dem], Dominate [dom] or Presence [pre] as it is played, and its cost is not paid. Lock this vampire.
[DEM] As above, but do not lock this vampire.

rulings.text: Can be used as an action modifier by a non-acting ready unlocked minion controlled by the controller of the acting minion. [LSJ 20090425] [LSJ 19990425]

Cards are not replaced during the "as played" window. The cancelation must be played immediately: no other effects can be used, except for wakes (eg. neither {The Barrens} nor {Dreams of the Sphinx} can be used). [LSJ 20061207] [RBK playing-a-card] [LSJ 20061013]

If the canceled card had a "do not replace until" clause (or alternate replacement like {Steely Tenacity}), that clause is canceled as well and the card is replaced normally. [LSJ 20080630] [LSJ 20011023]

The canceled card has still been played. The same reaction or modifier cannot be played again by the same minion. Any card which text prohibits to play more than once cannot be played again. [ANK 20190104] [RBK cancel-a-card] [LSJ 19980212]
If a limited effect is canceled (bleed, additional strike), then the limit is not triggered and another limited effect can be used. [LSJ 20030224]
If an action is canceled, it is not performed and the minion is free to attempt the same action again. [RBK cancel-a-card]
Can only cancel minion cards played from the hand in the normal fashion (eg. can't cancel allies played via {Piper}). [RTR 20001020]
Can be used to cancel all action cards, including employ retainer, recruit ally and political action. [ANK 20200813-2]
Cancelation must be immediate: a wake can be used in the "as played" window, but a reaction to "unlock and attempt to block" cannot. [LSJ 20021011]
[dem]If a minion who is attempting to block is locked, then that block will fail, unless they woke earlier during the action. [LSJ 20010702] [TOM 19951007] [LSJ 19991025]
rulings.group: Lock a minion during block attempt
